headline: Robinhood To Report As Growth Slows And Expansions Add Risk
summary: Robinhood prepares to report earnings for the first quarter late Tuesday with user engagement and growth moves, including prediction markets, under watch. Robinhood stock fell near key technical levels.

headline: If Bitcoin Hits $100K This Year, CONL Could Deliver Explosive Gains for Traders
summary: Here is the math that should anchor every conversation about GraniteShares 2x Long COIN Daily ETF (NASDAQ:CONL): Coinbase stock is down roughly 12% this year, and CONL is down roughly 40%. The fund promises 2x the daily move of Coinbase. It promises only the daily move, which is a different animal entirely from what a ... headline: Prediction markets prepare to invade one of crypto’s biggest and riskiest trades
summary: There’s a land grab underway in the U.S. for perpetual futures, one of the biggest and riskiest parts of crypto — and prediction markets want a piece of it.

raw.headline: Prediction markets prepare to invade one of crypto’s biggest and riskiest trades
raw.summary: There’s a land grab underway in the U.S. for perpetual futures, one of the biggest and riskiest parts of crypto — and prediction markets want a piece of it.
